import { Person, PermIdentity, LocalShippingOutlined, CalendarToday, Place, MailOutline, } from "@material-ui/icons"; import { Link, useLocation } from "react-router-dom"; import { useSelector } from 'react-redux'; import "./order.css"; import {format} from 'timeago.js'; import { useState } from "react"; import { DataGrid } from "@material-ui/data-grid"; import { Dialog, DialogTitle, DialogActions, Button } from '@material-ui/core'; const Order = () => { const location = useLocation(); const orderId = location.pathname.split("/")[2]; const order = useSelector((state) => state.order.orders.find(order => order._id === orderId) ); const [orderState, setOrderState] = useState(order); console.log(orderState.products) const handleUpdateOrder = () => { } const columns = [ { field: "productId", headerName: "Product ID", width: 200}, { field: "title", headerName: "Product Title", width: 200 }, { field: "color", headerName: "Color", width: 150 }, { field: "quantity", headerName: "Quantity", width: 150 }, { field: "price", headerName: "Price for 100 kg", width: 200 }, { field: "price_for_product", headerName: "Price for Product", width: 200, renderCell: (params) => { return (
{params.row.quantity * params.row.price}
) } } ]; return (

); }; export default Order;
